data.revised_prompt: Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG. Exact layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only in #FF00FF magenta, no texture, no gradient, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines, no text. Subject: cute Q-version ranged enemy for Samsara Ascension, a chibi corrupted xianxia spell archer with big head, small body, dark teal robe, tiny bow or talisman focus held close, sly hostile expression, rounded readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. View: three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, full body visible, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 58 to 66 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin. Animation: walk cycle with real body pose changes. Top-left: first stride, front limb or leading side moves forward, body leans in travel direction. Top-right: passing step, body rises, rear limb or trailing side catches up, cloth or petals trail backward. Bottom-left: opposite stride, other limb or side moves forward, weight clearly shifts. Bottom-right: passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop reads as movement. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes, costume marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and tiny attached aura may change. Containment: entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. Clean HD hand-painted game sprite animation sheet, crisp readable shapes, consistent lighting, polished fantasy RPG asset.
